title: ayenia decaryana
intro: Ayenia decaryana, also known as the "Ayenia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ayenia decaryana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
